title: Missing Mossel Bay woman found
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The 62-year-old Margrit March, who had been reported missing to the Da Gamaskop Police Station on Sunday 23 November, has been found.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 62-year-old Margrit March, who had been reported missing to the Da Gamaskop Police Station on Sunday 23 November, has been found."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, said March, who had last been seen leaving Mountain View in Mossel Bay on Sunday, was found unharmed the following day, 24 November, and has been reunited with her family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The Da Gamaskop Police thank everyone who assisted in the search,” he said.","html":"“The Da Gamaskop Police thank everyone who assisted in the search,” he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article: Police ask for assistance in finding missing woman","html":"Previous article: Police ask for assistance in finding missing woman"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
